title: Proteins annotation of Nano-DESI MSI datasets
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"8pt52","text":"Scope: ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4eq2r","text":"Annotate protein species detected by Nano-DESI IMS analysis.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"eakbt","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cis72","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Create mass list from the averaged spectrum.
Calculate the charge state of each multiply charged peaks based on the spacing between the isotopic peaks.
Calculate the exact mass based on the m/z and charge state.
Obtain CID data from each sample.
Assign peaks by matching the exact mass and the CID spectrum to the protein databank. http://prospector.ucsf.edu/prospector/cgi-bin/msform.cgi?form=msproduct
creator: yang1832
